auth.change_password_intro: For your account's security, replace the default password with one only you know.
auth.new_password_too_short: New password must be at least 6 chars
auth.passwords_dont_match: The two new passwords don't match

sidebar.lyrics_editor_tooltip: Listen and tap Space to make synced LRC
sidebar.visualizer_lab_tooltip: Preview, hide, or write your own visualizer effects

tracks.no_tracks: No tracks indexed yet. Drop MP3s into the music dir and click Rescan.
tracks.delete_confirm:
Delete "{name}"?

This removes the file from disk and the track from the library.
tracks.delete_only_owner_tooltip: Only the uploader can delete a track

badge.public_tooltip: You made this track public — visible to everyone

modal_edit.title: Edit track
modal_edit.footer_note: Edits go to the database only — the MP3 file is never modified.
modal_edit.non_owner_warning: Owned by {name}. You can change your own marks (rating / favorite) but not the metadata or share settings.

share.no_other_users: No other users yet. Add some from the Admin page.
share.now_public: Set to public (visible to all users)

auto.description: Tries LRCLIB → Netease → QQ → Kugou in order and saves the first match. Good for bulk coverage; for picking a specific version, use Search.

search.description: Search 4 sources in parallel and pick the version you want

paste.placeholder:
Paste LRC text, e.g.:
[00:12.34]First line
[00:18.20]Second line

playlist_view.share_modal_intro: When the list is visible to others, the tracks inside it become visible too (even private ones).
playlist_view.no_tracks: No tracks in this playlist yet. Switch to All Tracks and click + to add.

favorites_share.title: Share my favorites
favorites_share.intro: When you share or make your favorites public, others see a "<your name>'s favorites" item in their sidebar — and the tracks inside become visible to them (even your private ones).

user_favorites_view.title: {name}'s favorites
user_favorites_view.no_tracks: This user's favorites list is empty.
user_favorites_view.no_access: You don't have access to {name}'s favorites

admin.title: Admin · Users
admin.tooltip_self_admin: Can't change your own admin status
admin.delete_confirm: Really delete user {username}? This will end their session.

create.title: Add user
create.intro: On first sign-in, the user will be forced to change their password.
create.password_help: Send this to the user — they'll change it on first login.
create.username_invalid: Username must be 2–32 chars: lowercase letters, digits, _ or -
create.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 chars

reset.title: Reset {username}'s password
reset.intro: After reset the user is signed out everywhere; on next login they use the new password and are immediately asked to change it again.

eq_panel.title: Equalizer
eq_panel.mode_per_track_tooltip: Each song keeps its own EQ curve
eq_panel.mode_global_tooltip: All songs share one global EQ curve
eq_panel.on_disabled_global_tooltip: Global mode keeps EQ engaged at all times — switch to Per-track to bypass
eq_panel.reset_tooltip: Reset all bands and pre-amp to 0 dB
eq_panel.preamp_help: Reduce when boosting bands to prevent clipping.

lyrics_editor.title: Lyrics Editor
lyrics_editor.step3: Step 3 / 3 · Play and tap Space to time-stamp
lyrics_editor.paste_intro: Paste lyric text {bold} (one line per phrase). Empty lines are stripped. Next step adds timestamps line by line.
lyrics_editor.no_duration_warning: ⚠️ This track's duration is unknown — the progress bar may be inaccurate.
lyrics_editor.tag_kbd_help_l: Space mark · Backspace undo · Enter play/pause · ←→ ±3s · ↑↓ change line
lyrics_editor.tag_kbd_help_r: Click any line to jump · click a stamp to seek the audio
lyrics_editor.tag_clear_all_confirm: Clear all timestamps and start over?
lyrics_editor.leave_warn_tag: Going back will discard the current timestamps. Continue?
lyrics_editor.save_partial_confirm: {count} lines have no timestamps and will be dropped on save. Continue?
lyrics_editor.save_success: Saved to this track's lyric file ({count} lines)

viz_lab.title: Visualizer Lab
viz_lab.description: Previews use a synthetic spectrum so they animate without playback.
viz_lab.no_customs: No custom effects yet — paste some code below to add one.
viz_lab.delete_confirm: Delete this custom effect? This cannot be undone.
viz_lab.name_required: Please give your effect a name first.
viz_lab.signature_hint: Function body. Inputs: ctx (CanvasRenderingContext2D), W, H (canvas px), heights[56] in 0..1, peaks[56] in 0..1, rot (slow-rotating angle in rad).
